description: Increases the number of actions.
name: Do-or-Die
---Ultimate Skills---
note:
スキル１番は［攻撃］コマンドを
選択したときに使用されます。

description:
A skill that tears through all enemies in a flash. Deals dark damage 
to all enemies. Medium chance of inflicting Slip.
name: Demons Roots

description:
An all-or-nothing strike with demonkind's survival on the line.
Always strikes first. Deals lighting damage to a single enemy.
name: Lightning Decapitation

description:
A skill that brings final salvation to tormented lives. Deals crystal 
damage to a single enemy and reduces all enemy stats for 3 turns.
name: Salvation

description:
Protective skill of Lace. Grants superior evasion, guards the party, 
restores HP, and increases Defense and Magic Defense for 3 turns.
name: Aegis Storm

description:
A one-hit deathblow skill used to fulfill the gladiators' mission. 
Ignores Defense. Deals high damage to humans.
name: Mission Punch

description:
Innumerable rays of light rain down and strike enemies. Deals light 
damage to all enemies. Reduces enemy Magic Defense for 2 turns.
name: Prism Trism

description:
A prototype gun that uses a new virus that was erased from history.
Always hits. Removes Do-or-Die, Corruption, and Blessed statuses.
name: Lost Innocent

description:
A skill boasting the highest speed among imperial-style swordplay.
Hits all enemies. High chance of inflicting Slip.
name: Imperial-Style Tenfold Sword
note:
<発動前コモン:57>
属性がのる

description:
A skill that cuts through all enemies in a flash. Always hits first. 
Deals dark damage.
name: Dark Crimson Blade

description:
A skill that delivers fragments of unfulfilled hope to the future. 
Deals dark damage to all foes. Medium chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Origin Roots

description:
A sword that radiates hope to reach the extremes of battle.
Always hits first. Deals light damage.
name: Prayer Sword

description: Can only be used on subsequent playthroughs.
name: Super Blessing

description: Increases the number of actions.
name: Blessing

description: Increases the number of actions.
name: Corruption

description: Leap into the air and execute a double kick using your full weight.
name: Double Kick

description:
Strike an opponent's knee from behind to destroy their posture. 
Low chance of inflicting Slip.
name: Dislocate Knee

description:
Get behind an opponent and wrap both arms around their neck.
Low chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Sleeper Choke

description:
Reese brings the aroma of bergamot to the battlefield.
Prevents abnormal statuses for 3 turns.
name: ---Demons---

description:
Fire a flaming projectile from the hands or mouth of a demon.
Deals fire damage to a single enemy.
name: Magic Bullet

description:
Emit poison mist from the body of a demon. Medium chance of 
inflicting Poison on 2 enemies.
name: Poison Mist

description: Fire a bolt of lightning that won't miss.
name: Dark Thunder

description:
Unleash a noxious combination of plant pollen and fungus. Minor 
damage to 2 enemies. Medium chance of inflicting Blind.
name: Ancient Mist

description:
Manipulate giant tree roots like clay. Slightly increases all allies' 
Defense for 3 turns.
name: Nagi Roots

description:
Scatter seeds that retaliate when you're attacked. Counters physical 
attacks for 3 turns. Low chance of inflicting Poison.
name: Gi Seed

description:
Create numerous thorns on allies' weapons. Slightly increases all 
allies' Attack for 3 turns.
name: Loki Thorns

description:
Scatter leaves that disrupt the enemy's magic. Increases all allies' 
Magic Defense for 3 turns.
name: Seli Leaves

description:
Partake of flower dewdrops infused with life energy. Restores 20% 
of HP, MP, and TP to all allies.
name: Mei Dew

description:
Unleash blood-sucking plants raised through Deathpolca's magic.
Deals earth damage to a single enemy. Absorbs HP and TP.
name: Carnivorous Plants
note:
<DE_HP吸収率:100>
アネモネ
カウンター攻撃にできないか
双子種
種を埋め込み、手持ちの種が潰されると埋め込んだ種がトゲを生む。

description:
Unleash a violent plant created with Deathpolca's life force.
Hits all enemies. Reduces current HP by 30%.
name: Chimeric Seed

description: Stab with a rose that can penetrate even steel. Ignores Defense.
name: Bloody Rose

description: Act as cute as possible. Makes enemies struggle to hit Deathpolca.
name: Devilish Girl

description: Low chance of inflicting Confusion or Paralysis on all enemies.
name: Demon Anthem

description:
A quick swing that targets a single enemy's blind spot.
Always hits first. Raises TP by 25%.
name: Drizzle

description:
Forgo defense to plunge into the enemy party and attack.
Hits all enemies. Reduces Defense for 1 turn.
name: Shower

description:
Disrupt an enemy's focus, weakening their offense. Reduces a single 
enemy's Attack and Magic for 3 turns. (Can be stacked once.)
name: Monsoon

description:
A new sword technique created by mixing two existing techniques.
Ignores Defense. Attacks twice.
name: Crimson Rain

description:
A deathblow skill that morphs your blade into a bolt of lightning.
Always attacks first. Deals lightning damage to a single enemy.
name: Thunderstorm

description:
Scatter poisonous, barbed plants among your enemies. Physically 
attacks all enemies. Low chance of inflicting Poison.
name: Revenge Thorns

description:
Scatter poisonous, barbed plants among your enemies. Physically 
attacks all enemies. Low chance of inflicting Poison.
name: Gi Thorn

description:
Dash through the enemies like a glint of light. All stats multiplied 
by 1.2 for 3 turns. 50% chance to counter physical attacks.
name: Daybreak

description: Deals lightning damage to all enemies.
name: Thunder Rave

description:
A deathblow skill that swathes your sword in black flames.
Deals fire damage to a single enemy.
name: Firestorm

description:
Glare at the enemy. Low chance of inflicting Paralysis 
on all enemies.
name: Demon Eye

description:
Send petals dancing through the air, severing the unsightly.	
Ignores Defense and always hits.
name: Flower Execution

description:
In this refined world, the inelegant shall be consigned to the 
underworld. Deals ice damage to all enemies.
name: Snow, Moon, Flowers

description:
An unspoken, vanished vision. If only we could meet again.
Deals dark damage to a single enemy.
name: Floral Reflection

description: Restores a little HP to an ally.
name: Heal

description:
The second coming of the coliseum's invincible Goddess of Battle. 
Increases TP Charge Rate, Accuracy, Evasion, and Agility for 3 turns.
name: Battle Goddess Descent

description:
Disassemble flesh and bones with well-trained hands. Medium 
chance of inflicting Bleed. Deals high damage to humans.
name: Butcher

description:
Slice through the enemy, leaving behind poison. Always hits.

name: Deadly Poison

description:
Yield to pleasure and remove the body's limiters. Increases Attack

name: Bloody Rend

description:

name: Death Blood

description:
Call for a truce with an enemy slave. Can only be used on slaves.
Set chance to cause them to retreat.
name: Appeal

description:
Guard allies for 1 turn. Will take attacks that hit the whole 
party as well.

description: Guard allies for 2 turns. Raises user's Evasion by 10%.

description:
Guard allies for 2 turns. Raises user's Evasion by 20%.

description:
Guard allies for 1 turn. Decreases Defense and Magic Defense

description:
A spear skill that neutralizes oncoming attacks. Raises Evasion by

name: Deflect

description:
A spear skill that neutralizes oncoming attacks from all directions.

description:

description:
Hit an enemy with multiple attacks. Damage is dependent on user's 
Attack and Luck.
name: Critical Edge

description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to all allies.
name: Ripeara

description: Restores a significant amount of HP to all allies.
name: Ripeidol

description:
Holy perception magic. Consumes 30 MP and 70 TP.
Reduces all enemy stats by 30% for 3 turns.
name: Eye of Truth

description:
A blade from beyond that always hits. Reduces Defense and Magic 
Defense of a single enemy for 3 turns.
name: Drawn Blade

description:
A holy, dark sword reaching from behind. Deals dark damage to all
enemies. Damage increases with the king's Attack and Magic stats.
name: Twin Dragon Swords

description:
A holy sword from beyond. Reduces a single enemy's Attack and 
Magic for 3 turns.
name: Dominant Decision

description:
A sword from beyond that pierces through despair. Power increases 
with the king's Attack and Magic stats.
name: Edge of Hope

description:
Release dragon fire. Deals fire damage to all enemies. Low chance 
of inflicting Burn.
name: Red Breath

description: Medium chance of inflicting 2 enemies with Confusion.
name: Arrow of Confusion

description: High chance of inflicting a single enemy with Faint.
name: Bone Strike

description: A basic earth spell. Deals earth damage to a single enemy.
name: Rockfall Trap

description: A basic fire spell. Deals fire damage to a single enemy.
name: Explosion Trap

description: MP 300, absorbs 50 TP.
name: Energy Hack

description: Leap into the air and execute a double kick using your full weight.
name: Double Kick

description:
Get behind an opponent and wrap both arms around their neck.
Low chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Sleeper Choke

description:
A low kick aimed at the enemy's calf. Medium chance of inflicting
a single enemy with Faint.
name: Calf Kick

description:
A secret skill that uses one's spirit to make fire to burst from their 
legs and crush a single enemy. Always hits. Deals fire damage.
name: Flaming Legs Eruption

description: Tenka Taihei's ultimate secret skill. Instantly kills all enemies.
name: Tenka Finale

description:
An excellent skill that delivers a super-fast hit to the solar plexus.
Always hits. Ignores Defense.
name: Lightning Elbow Spear

description: Tenka Finale Preparation
name: Raise Fighting Spirit

description: Lost Ally
name: Induct

description: Destruction Blaster Prep
name: Energy Charge

description:
High chance to cause abnormal status effects. Inflicts a single
enemy with Paralysis.
name: Mysterious Ray

description:
A basic lightning spell. Medium chance of inflicting 
2 enemies with Paralysis.
name: Paralyze

description: A special dark spell. deals extreme dark damage to all enemies.
name: Demon's Gaia

description: Restores a moderate amount of HP to an ally.
name: Spirit Stone

description:
Draws you to Fuh. Consumes 10 Spirit Stones (\INUM[6] remaining).
Cannot be used in battle.
name: Fuh's Pull

description:
Practical close-quarters techniques. Damages a single enemy. 
Low chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Krav Maga

description:
A baton that delivers a high-voltage shock to enemies it hits. Deals 
lightning damage to an enemy. Low chance of inflicting Paralysis.
name: Stun Rod

description:
Relentlessly attack the enemy's weak points. Decreases enemy's 
Defense for 3 turns. (Effect can be stacked once.)
name: Kick-Ass

description:
Hide so skillfully that the enemy loses sight of you.
Targeted less for 3 turns.
name: Sneak

description:
Administer first aid with medicine from another world. 
Restores 2,000 HP and increases an ally's TP by 15.
name: First Aid

description:
Emergency treatment with tools from another world. Cures an ally
of all abnormal status effects and grants immunity for 3 turns.
name: Emergency Treatment

description:
A weapon from another world that fires bullets (Ammo: \INUM[89]).
Damages a single enemy. Low chance of inflicting Bleed.
name: Machine Gun

description:
A weapon from another world that burns a single enemy. Deals fire 
damage to a single enemy. Medium chance of inflicting Burn.
name: Molotov

description:
A weapon from another world that fires bullets (Ammo: \INUM[89]).
Damages a single enemy. Low chance of inflicting Bleed.
name: Machine Gun

description:
A weapon from another world that fires buckshot (Ammo: \INUM[90]).
Hits three random enemies.
name: Shotgun

description:
A rapid-fire weapon from another world (Consumes 3 machine gun 
bullets). Damages a single enemy. Low chance of inflicting Bleed.
name: Heavy Machine Gun

description:
A weapon from another world that creates an explosion (Ammo: 
\INUM[91]). Damages all enemies. Low chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Rocket Launcher

description:
A weapon from another world that incinerates an enemy. Deals fire 
damage to a single enemy. Medium chance of inflicting Burn.
name: Molotov

description:
A weapon from another world that robs foes of sight with a cloud 
of smoke. Medium chance of inflicting all enemies with Blind.
name: Smoke Grenade

description:
A weapon from another world that that launches missiles (Ammo: 
\INUM[92]). Damages all enemies. Medium chance of inflicting Faint.
name: Javelin

description:
Down a highly nutritious drink in a single gulp. Restores 10% of TP 
to an ally for 3 turns.
name: Energy Drink

description:
Down a highly nutritious drink in a single gulp. Restores 10% of TP 
to the party for 3 turns.
name: Energy Box

description:
Cut through enemy with blade covered in lightning. Deals lightning
damage to an enemy. High chance of reducing lightning resistance.
name: Electro Blade

description:
Cut through an enemy with a blade covered in ice. Deals ice damage
to a single enemy. High chance of reducing ice resistance.
name: Cold Blade

description:
Cut through an enemy with blade covered in fire. Deals fire damage
to a single enemy. High chance of reducing fire resistance.
name: Burst Blade

description:
Cut through a foe with blade covered in light. Deals light damage 
to a single enemy. High chance of reducing light resistance.
name: Saint Blade

description:
Cut through an enemy with a blade covered in darkness. Deals dark
damage to a single enemy. High chance of reducing dark resistance.
name: Dark Blade

description:
Command your allies in a basic imperial strategy battle formation.
Increases party's Accuracy for 2 turns.
name: Crane Wing Formation

description:
Split allies into a diversion team and an attack team and command 
them. Increases party's Critical for 2 turns.
name: Fish Scale Formation

description:
Command with the essence of imperial tactics. Slightly increases 
party's stats for 3 turns.
name: Imperial Tactics

description:
Send petals dancing through the air to attack your enemies.
Ignores Defense. Always hits.
name: Flower Execution

description:
A weapon from another world that fires tear gas grenades without a
sound. Damages an enemy. Medium chance of inflicting Confusion.
name: Slingshot

description:
A weapon from another world that fires bullets (Ammo: \INUM[89]).
Damages a single enemy. Low chance of inflicting Bleed.
name: Machine Gun

description:
Scatter enemy's magic power, weakening their magic. Lowers Magic 
for 3 turns. (Effect can be stacked once.)
name: Magic Break

description:
Damage the enemy's armor. Reduces enemy's Defense for 3 turns. 
(Effect can be stacked once.)
name: Armor Break

description: A quick, defense-ignoring attack. Always strikes first.
name: Twinkling Earth

description: Deals lightning damage to all enemies.
name: Book of Lightning

description:
A swift attack to all enemies that ignores Defense.
Always strikes first.
name: Twinkling Earth - Destruction

description:
Morph into a demon of destruction. All stats double for 10 turns. 
Adds an extra action. Prevents all abnormal status effects.
name: Carnage

description:
Morph into a demon of destruction. All stats double for 10 turns. 
Adds an extra action. Prevents all abnormal status effects.
name: Carnage

description: A quick, defense-ignoring attack. Always strikes first.
name: Twinkling Earth - Destruction

description:
Use the power of Remnant Mebius and dash through your enemies.
All stats multiplied by 1.2 for 3 turns. 50% chance to counter.
name: Daybreak

description:
Crystallize an ally's wounds and very slowly heal them. 
1% HP Regen until the end of battle. Lowers Agility by 20%.
name: Crystallize
note:
単体回復はTPを多く稼げる。
全体回復はほぼTPを得られない。
特殊全体回復はTPも得られる。

description:
Metallicizes a part of a single enemy's body and slows them down.
Deals crystal damage. Reduces enemy Evasion by 30% for 2 turns.
name: Metal

description:
Metallicizes a part of the enemy's body and slows them down. Deals 
major crystal damage. Reduces enemy Accuracy by 30% for 2 turns.
name: Heavy Metal

description:
Cause bubbles to adhere to enemy's weapon. Deals crystal damage.
Reduces enemy Attack and Magic for 2 turns.
name: Bubble Quartz

description:
Give a crystal of friendship to your allies. Heals all status effects
and prevents status abnormalities for 3 turns.
name: Star Rose

description: Increases the number of actions.
name: Blessing

description: Increases the number of actions.
name: Corruption

description: Deals high damage to all enemies.
name: Decapitate

description: Deals high fire damage to 2 enemies.
name: Fiery Execution

description:
Guard allies for 1 turn. Will take attacks that hit the whole 
party as well.
name: Smirk at Prisoner

description:
Guard allies for 1 turn. Will take attacks that hit the whole 
party as well.
name: Guard
note: 赤まる全体攻撃より遅い

name: Struggle
note:
スキル１番は［攻撃］コマンドを
選択したときに使用されます。
